summary: Iteration 98: Events and Restaurant Menu new fields VERIFIED. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Events API correctly accepts and returns all new fields: doors_open, end_date, ticket_price, contact_email, contact_phone, cover_image
Restaurant Menu API correctly handles ingredients field as array

Events Management form includes all required fields: Event Name, Cover Image, Type, City, Venue Name, Start Date, End Date, Doors Open Time, Ticket Price, Total Capacity, Contact Email, Contact Phone, Operator, Description
Events Results page displays: date, time (from doors_open/start_time), price (FCFA), contact info, cover image
Restaurant Menu page shows menu item images and expandable ingredients section with badges
Menu Item Form in management includes Ingredients textarea with helper text 'Enter ingredients separated by commas'
seed_data_creation: Test events and menu items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Events and Restaurant Menu features fully implemented. Events have new fields: doors_open, end_date, ticket_price, contact_email, contact_phone, cover_image. Restaurant menu items support ingredients array. Test restaurant ID: b07dd31f-1799-436d-ac4e-6fe0976ec54f has 'Spicy Chicken Wings' with ingredients.
